mapper.sql: SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.manufacturer_id, g.description, g.del_flag, g.tenant_id, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, m.manufacturer_name, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM iot_device_group_rel r WHERE r.group_id = g.group_id) AS device_count FROM iot_device_group g LEFT JOIN iot_manufacturer m ON g.manufacturer_id = m.manufacturer_id AND m.del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE iot_device_group SET del_flag = '2' WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM iot_device_group_rel WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM iot_device_group_rel WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} AND group_id = #{groupId}
mapper.select: SELECT group_id FROM iot_device_group_rel WHERE device_id = #{deviceId}
SELECT device_id FROM iot_device_group_rel WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
